list.name: profile_id
list.label: profile_id
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM data_risk_score_day_v3 ORDER BY profile_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM data_risk_score_day_v3 ORDER BY profile_id

targets.rawSql: SELECT dt AS time, risk_score AS value FROM data_risk_score_day_v3 WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT dt, risk_status, risk_score FROM data_risk_score_day_v3 WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT dt, risk_score, risk_status, validation_fail_count, validation_warn_count, drift_alert_count, drift_warn_count, ml_feature_alert_count, ml_feature_warn_count, total_signal_count FROM data_risk_score_day_v3 WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC LIMIT 15
SELECT dt AS time, 'risk_score_v3' AS metric, risk_score AS value FROM data_risk_score_day_v3 WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY time

SELECT dt AS time, 'validation_contribution' AS metric, (validation_fail_count * 5 + validation_warn_count * 2) AS value FROM data_risk_score_day_v3 WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'drift_contribution' AS metric, (drift_alert_count * 3 + drift_warn_count * 1) AS value FROM data_risk_score_day_v3 WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'ml_feature_contribution' AS metric, (COALESCE(ml_feature_alert_count,0) * 2 + COALESCE(ml_feature_warn_count,0) * 1) AS value FROM data_risk_score_day_v3 WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY time
SELECT dt AS time, cause_type AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM data_risk_root_cause_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) GROUP BY dt, cause_type ORDER BY time

SELECT dt AS time, 'fail_count' AS metric, fail_count AS value FROM validation_summary_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'warn_count' AS metric, warn_count AS value FROM validation_summary_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'pass_count' AS metric, pass_count AS value FROM validation_summary_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY time

SELECT dt AS time, metric_name AS metric, metric_value AS value FROM metric_value_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND metric_name IN ('mapping_coverage_auth','mapping_coverage_loan','mapping_coverage_card','submit_capture_rate','success_outcome_capture_rate') AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY time

SELECT dt, hh, rule_group, rule_name, metric_name, validation_status, severity, observed_value, expected_value, diff_value, note FROM validation_result WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC, hh DESC, validation_status DESC, metric_name LIMIT 100

SELECT dt AS time, drift_status AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM metric_drift_result_r WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND drift_status IN ('warn', 'alert') AND $__timeFilter(dt) GROUP BY dt, drift_status ORDER BY time

SELECT dt, hh, metric_name, baseline_value, observed_value, drift_score, drift_method, drift_status, severity, detail FROM metric_drift_result_r WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC, ABS(drift_score) DESC, metric_name LIMIT 100

SELECT dt, hh, metric_name, metric_group, source_layer, baseline_value, observed_value, drift_score, drift_method, drift_status, severity FROM metric_drift_result_r WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND drift_status='alert' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC, ABS(drift_score) DESC, metric_name LIMIT 100

SELECT dt AS time, 'auth_attempt_count' AS metric, metric_value AS value FROM metric_value_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND metric_name='auth_attempt_count' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'auth_success_count' AS metric, metric_value AS value FROM metric_value_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND metric_name='auth_success_count' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'loan_apply_start_count' AS metric, metric_value AS value FROM metric_value_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND metric_name='loan_apply_start_count' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'loan_apply_submit_count' AS metric, metric_value AS value FROM metric_value_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND metric_name='loan_apply_submit_count' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'card_apply_start_count' AS metric, metric_value AS value FROM metric_value_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND metric_name='card_apply_start_count' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'card_apply_submit_count' AS metric, metric_value AS value FROM metric_value_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND metric_name='card_apply_submit_count' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY time

SELECT dt, metric_x, metric_y, baseline_corr, observed_corr, corr_gap, anomaly_status, severity, note FROM metric_correlation_anomaly_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC, ABS(corr_gap) DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT dt, hh, metric_name, baseline_value, observed_value, anomaly_score, anomaly_status, severity, note FROM metric_time_anomaly_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC, ABS(anomaly_score) DESC, metric_name LIMIT 100

SELECT dt, risk_category, source_type, source_key, contribution_score, note FROM risk_signal_link_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC, contribution_score DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT dt, cause_rank, cause_type, related_metric, confidence, detail FROM data_risk_root_cause_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC, cause_rank ASC LIMIT 100
